Open Closed closes at %1$s closes %1$s, %2$s opens at %1$s opens %1$s, %2$s Share %1$s link Package file Uninstall Pin to favorites Unpin Back App info Launch Customize Open View on map Open website Undo Import Done More actions Clear Install Quit Delete Remove Open in contacts app Open in calendar app Search Version %1$s Settings Help Wallpaper North North east North north east East north east East East south east South east South south east South South south west South west West south west West West north west North west North north west UV %1$d
a fallback that is suited best for most users of this language should be used (English in most cases) -->
Title: %1$s Artist: %1$s Album: %1$s Duration: %1$s Year: %1$s Size: %1$s Path: %1$s Type: %1$s Dimensions: %1$s App name: %1$s Version: %1$s Package name: %1$s Min SDK version: %1$s Owner: %1$s Location: %1$s Directory Archive file Android package file Source code file Document Spreadsheet Audio Video Image File Presentation Compressed file Text file E-book Drawing Form %1$s backup %1$s theme %1$s file The directory %1$s and all its content will be deleted permanently. Proceed\? The file %1$s will be deleted permanently. Proceed\? The shortcut %1$s will be removed permanently. Proceed\? Pinned %1$s Couldn\'t add shortcut YouTube https://www.youtube.com/results\?search_query=${1} Google Play https://play.google.com/store/search\?q=${1} The placeholder \'${1}\' is missing in this URL Replace icon Delete icon Custom icon Advanced Query encoding Percent-encoding application/x-www-form-urlencoded None Edit widgets Weather Calendar Media Apps Note Unknown Add widget Widget removed Write a note New note Save Note_%1$s Dismiss Note dismissed By %1$s Close No selection Save Save as file Duplicate Edit Skip Next Turn off Remove Replace Edit favorites Not pinned – frequently used Pinned – automatically sorted Pinned – manually sorted Drag items here Tags Pinned tags will appear here Create tag Nextcloud server URL This URL does not point to a valid Nextcloud installation Owncloud server URL This URL does not point to a valid Owncloud installation Password User name If you have two factor authentication enabled, you must use an app password here. Login failed: incorrect username or password. Continue Log in Disclaimer Exchange rates as published once per day by the European Central Bank. All information is provided \"as is\" without any kind of guarantee. No liability is assumed for these information. \n \nLast update: %1$s Show all Today Tomorrow Upcoming Next event No events today
+%1$d running event from past days
+%1$d running events from past days
+%1$d unfinished task
+%1$d unfinished tasks
All day Due at %1$s Due on %1$s Due today %1$s is playing media No media has been played yet Interactive progress bar Sleet showers Heavy sleet Light rain showers and thunder Heavy rain Light snow and thunder Light rain Light rain showers Light snow Heavy sleet showers and thunder Light snow showers Lights sleet showers and thunder Snow and thunder Heavy sleet showers Heavy snow Cloudy Light rain and thunder Snow Hail Thunderstorm Thunder Heavy snow showers Heavy rain showers Rain showers and thunder Clear sky Sleet Rain Sleet and thunder Lights snow showers and thunder Heavy rain showers and thunder Fair Fog Haze Sleet showers and thunder Rain and thunder Light sleet Heavy sleet and thunder Partly cloudy Heavy snow and thunder Rain showers Light sleet and thunder Heavy snow showers and thunder Light sleet showers Snow showers and thunder Snow showers Heavy rain and thunder Wind Unknown No weather data available Set location Location not found Location access is required to determine the location automatically Notification access is required to control media playback Contacts permission is required to search contacts Phone permission is required to start calls Calendar permission is required to search calendar Tasks permission is required to search tasks in the Tasks app Tasks permission is required to use the Tasks integration This widget requires the calendar permission Can\'t find your calendars? %1$s must be set as default home app to search app shortcuts External storage permission is required to search files on this device All files access is required to search local files Notification access is required to display notification badges Calendar permission is required to display upcoming events here Calendar permission is required to search your calendar Location permission is required to search nearby locations Storage permission is required to search files on this device Contacts permission is required to search your contacts Set %1$s as default home app to search app shortcuts. Set %1$s as default home app to create shortcuts. Do Not Disturb access is required to automatically enable DND mode. Enable Do Not Disturb Automatically turn on DND when focus mode is active Setting the launcher as default home app is required to manage work and private profiles. Grant Appearance Theme Light Dark Color scheme New color scheme Default High contrast Black and white Color palette Source for dynamic colors System Wallpaper Shapes New shapes scheme Default Extra round Rectangular Base shape Typography New typography scheme Transparency New transparency scheme Default Semi-transparent Font About Advanced Version Links Open source licenses Advanced Open website App and license information Integrations, plugins, backup, debug and app info Optional features Maintenance Customize the look and feel Provider MET Norway OpenWeatherMap Deutscher Wetterdienst (Germany only) HERE Breezy Weather Location Automatic location Use location services to determine location automatically Managed by plugin The location for this provider is managed by the plugin app Location Manage location in Breezy Weather Use degrees Fahrenheit and miles per hour Imperial units Compact mode Debug Tools Memory snapshot Capture a snapshot to analyze memory usage. The app will freeze until this process is completed. Capturing snapshot… Clean up database Remove broken and unused entries from the launcher database Reinstall icon packs Clear and rebuild the icon pack cache
%1$d entry has been removed
%1$d entries have been removed
Icons Cards Customize card appearance Corner radius Stroke width Opacity Shape Rounded Cut Shape Square Rounded square Squircle Reuleaux triangle Circle Teardrop Pebble Hexagon Search bar Integrations Plugins Manage installed extensions Enabled Installed No plugins installed Follow system Themed icons Color icons with the application\'s color scheme Enforce themed icons Apply the application\'s color scheme to all icons, including unsupported ones (not recommended) Icon pack No icon packs installed Animations Charging animation Play a bubble animation while the device is charging System bars Status bar icons Navigation bar icons Auto Light Dark Hide status bar Hide navigation bar Manage connected accounts and services Signed in as %1$s Sign out You are not logged in Pentagon Wallpaper Dim wallpaper In dark themes, darken wallpaper Blur wallpaper Use a blur effect on the wallpaper Not supported on this device Blur radius Choose a wallpaper Badges Notification badges Show a badge for applications with unread notifications Show a badge for suspended applications Suspended apps Cloud badges Show a badge for files that are stored in a cloud Shortcut badges Show a badge which indicates to which app a shortcut belongs Plugin badges Indicate by which plugin a search result was created Sign in to Nextcloud Sign in to search your Nextcloud server Nextcloud Owncloud Sign in to Owncloud Sign in to search your Owncloud server Telegram group F-Droid repository Enforce shape Apply shape to all icons including those that would normally not support it License This app is free software. Licensed under the GNU General Public License 3.0 Grid Icon size Number of columns Show apps in a list Show app icons in list Show labels Show the app name below the icon Show applications in a list instead of a grid Show icons in the list view Debug Troubleshooting tools Widgets Weather Media apps Clock Configure clock style and components Default Compact Show seconds Monospaced digits Time format 24-hour 12-hour Use theme color Fill screen height Alignment Top Center Bottom Dynamic zone Managed by Smartspacer Date Show the current date Dock Show pinned items in dock Dock rows Media Show media controls when there is an active media session Battery Always show Show when low or charging Off Alarms Show alarms that will ring within the next 8 hours Backup and restore Export and import launcher data Backup Export preferences and launcher data Restore Import a previously created backup Crash reporter Error and crash reports Logs View and export application logs Search App search, tags, hidden results Favorites Show pinned and frequently used items above app grid Apps Show all apps when the search field is empty App shortcuts Search app shortcuts Build information More information about this build of this app Style Customize search bar appearance Transparent Solid Hidden Color Open keyboard Automatically show the keyboard when opening the app drawer Launch on enter Launch highlighted match upon tapping go Excluded search results Manage excluded apps and search results Show reveal button Show a button to reveal excluded search results Tags Manage tags and tagged items Change the order of pinned items Frequently used Show frequently used items in favorites Edit button Show a button to rearrange the favorites Compact tags Hide tag labels or icons to reduce the space occupied by tags Show a button to add, remove and rearrange widgets Widgets on home screen Show widgets on the home screen instead of a separate page Enable widget pages Allow opening dedicated widget pages from gestures and navigation Widget screen count Note: Reducing the count will automatically reset gestures assigned to disabled screens. Home screen Clock, search bar, wallpaper, system bars Grid and icons Grid size, icons, badges Weather Media control Tasks Tasks is a free and open source to-do list and reminders app. If installed, %1$s can display and search your tasks from the Tasks app. Tasks integration is fully set up and ready to use. Open Tasks app Breezy Weather Breezy Weather is a free and open source weather app. If installed, %1$s can use Breezy Weather as a data source for weather data. To use Breezy Weather as weather provider:\n\n1. Go to Breezy Weather > Settings > Widgets & Live wallpaper > Send Gadgetbridge data > Enable %1$s\n\n2. In %1$s, select Breezy Weather as weather provider Open Breezy Weather Smartspacer Smartspacer is a free and open source At a Glance widget. If installed, it can be integrated into the dynamic zone of the clock widget Enable Smartspacer integration Open Smartspacer Feed Feed provider Swipe right on the home screen to open the feed No feed providers installed You haven\'t connected a Nextcloud account yet You haven\'t connected an Owncloud account yet Connect account Charging

Full in %1$s minutes
The backup has been completed. The selected file does not appear to be a backup. Are you sure you selected the right file? This backup has been created with a different version of %1$s and cannot be restored with this version. This backup has been created with a different version of %1$s. Some data might not be restored correctly. Created %1$s on %2$s with %3$s. The backup has been restored. Search and app drawer Swipe down Swipe left Swipe right Search bar position Top Bottom Arrangement of search results Top-down Bottom-up Fixed search bar Don\'t scroll the search bar out of view Fixed screen rotation Lock screen rotation to portrait mode Gestures Gestures and gesture actions Swipe down Swipe left Swipe right Swipe up Long press Home button/gesture Do nothing Open search Widgets Widgets %1$d Launch app Open notification drawer Open quick settings Show power menu Open recent apps Feed You have performed a \"%1$s\" gesture. This gesture is currently set to trigger a \"%2$s\" action. However, the action could not be performed for the following reason: The launcher\'s accessibility service needs to be enabled to perform this action. This action requires the launcher\'s accessibility service to be enabled. Ranking flexibility Stable Balanced Variable Borderless Background card Configure widget Resize Weather integration settings No calendars found Pick widget App widget failed to load Media control integration settings Link to file Sync the contents of this widget with an external file Linked to %1$s Unlink Relink Conflict Resolve Keep selected The linked file is not empty and its content does not match the last saved version of this note. Which version do you want to keep\? Last saved version: Current file content: Error reading note The linked file could not be read. A copy has been restored from the launcher\'s internal storage. If you edit the note, the linked file will possibly be overwritten Error saving note The note could not be written to the linked file. A copy has been saved to the launcher\'s internal storage Do you really want to delete the color scheme %1$s\? Do you really want to delete the shape scheme %1$s? (untitled) Use system default From primary color Palette Custom Restore default Contents Apply theme Theme already exists and will be updated The selected file could not be read. Please make sure that you selected a valid theme file (*.kvtheme), and that the file is not corrupt. Unavailable Locked This shortcut is unavailable because %1$s isn\'t the default launcher Enable plugin Unit of length Imperial Metric Call Navigation Bug Report Open 24/7 This plugin isn\'t working correctly You need to set up this plugin first Set up Weather provider Set as weather provider Currently set as weather provider This item does not exist anymore Bold Simple Orbit Binary Hands 7-segment No clock Custom widget Outlined Ticks Show filters Hide filters Tools Online results Apps Default filter Customize the default filter for searches Show filter bar Show quick filters above the keyboard Customize filter bar Customize which items are included in the filter bar The current filter enables online results by default. Your search queries might unintentionally be sent to external web services. For privacy reasons, this is not recommended. Label Tags Show in Focus mode Apps-only search, launch friction, and calmer launcher behavior Focus system One place for app rules, day planning, guidance, and review Focus settings Focus mode, app rules, schedules, and reports Launcher settings Home screen, appearance, search, gestures, and more Status Focus mode is on Focus mode is off Not started Partly configured Ready Quick guided setup for focus mode, app rules, and daily planning Open quick start Apps Essential and distracting apps, temporary access Visibility Hide or fade distracting apps, icon modes Friction and blocking Launch delays, adaptive friction, daily limits Schedules and day Daily schedule, habits, time rules Reports Focus report, insights, and history Guidance and profiles Support, profiles, context, and integrations Search sources, ranking, hidden items, favorites Gesture bindings and guarded actions Language, units, time format, calendar Debug, diagnostics, and build information Focus mode Enable focus, Do Not Disturb Quick start Pick a preset first, then fine-tune the parts that matter. This keeps setup fast without hiding the deeper controls. Open quick start guide Walk through the first setup path and jump to the next recommended screen Start with a preset, then add your focus apps and connect the rest of your day. The rest can stay off until you need it. Step 1. Choose your starting preset Balanced is the safest default. Hard focus is better if you want stronger friction right away. Minimal keeps the launcher calm with fewer prompts. Next steps Step 2. Mark essential and distracting apps Choose the apps you always want to keep visible and fast to launch, and those that distract you. Back Step 3. Connect the day Pick the calendar, schedule dock, and daily habits that should steer focus behavior. Add one or two daily habits so the launcher can protect the work you mean to do. Review unlocks and friction after a few days so you can tune the rules. Apply to personal profile Use focus rules inside the main personal profile on this device. Apply to work profile Extend focus rules to the work profile when the device uses one. Apply to private profile Keep the same focus rules available in the private profile area. Preset: Balanced A practical default with moderate friction, recovery help, and review suggestions Preset: Hard focus Stronger delay, shorter unlocks, and stricter protection for deep work Preset: Minimal Keep the launcher calm with lighter rules and fewer prompts Core rules Advanced focus rules Delays, unlock duration, productivity windows, and search behavior Adaptive friction Auto Light Normal Strict Plan your day Choose what the focus home shows during the day Guidance and review Off Enabled Focus at a glance Keep the current block and next cues visible on the focus home Commute mode Reserve a gentler transition state for in-between moments Adaptive context Let focus friction react to context instead of staying static all day Use charging context Treat charging as an extra signal when deciding how strict focus should be Explain focus decisions Show why the launcher is being stricter or calmer right now Review suggestions Surface small, local recommendations based on your weekly report Quick start your day Finish the minimum setup so the launcher can guide the day instead of leaving you with a blank focus surface. Enable focus launcher behavior Intercept distracting app launches and reduce casual browsing surfaces Strict search Launcher search stays limited to apps only Main launcher search now returns only applications. Shortcuts, contacts, events, files, websites and other result types are excluded. Hide distracting apps from browsing Keep distracting apps out of the empty search/all apps surface Essential & Distracting Apps Choose which apps are essential and which are distracting Essential apps Distracting apps Add essential app Always visible and never blocked during focus Add distracting app Subject to launch delay and focus blocking rules No essential apps selected yet. No distracting apps selected yet. All other apps are treated as Normal automatically. Choose an essential app Choose a distracting app Search apps Remove app Daily schedule Connect a calendar so focus mode can react to your day Enable daily schedule Use calendar events to drive the daily schedule Calendar Select the calendar that stores your schedule events No calendar selected Choose a calendar Search calendars No calendar No calendars found. Home panels Configure the panels shown on the focus home screen Upcoming events All calendars Search calendars Distracting app launch delay Distracting app unlock duration De-emphasize distracting apps Render distracting apps with reduced visual weight in search results Text-first app list Hide icons for non-essential apps to reduce visual temptation Enable Do Not Disturb during focus session If permission is granted, focus sessions will switch the phone into Do Not Disturb Productivity time Distracting apps are fully blocked during these hours Pick the time for this window. The value stays on the current day schedule. Productivity windows Window %1$d Start End Add productivity window Create another blocked time window for distracting apps Remove this window Focus support Tune start rituals, recovery help, time cues, and stronger protection Start support Recovery support Time awareness Harder protection Start ritual Pause before a focus session and define the first small step First tiny step prompt Ask for one concrete action so starting feels smaller Resume support Keep a short memory of what you were doing so you can return faster Resume reminder duration Recovery follows current block Prefer returning to the current schedule block instead of the last opened app when they still match Reset button Show a simple way to clear the current focus state and start fresh Transition warnings Give a calm heads-up before the next schedule block begins Warning lead time Block prep prompts Show a prep nudge when the current block is ending and the next block is close Prep lead time Block-aware session sizing Keep intentional unlocks shorter when the current block is almost over Escalating friction Make repeated launches of the same distracting app slower for a while Escalation window Extra delay per repeat Session cap Daily habits A short checklist of the habits that matter today Enable daily habits Show habits on the focus home and use them for habit gate checks Add habit Create another habit for the current day No habits yet. Add one or two that matter most. Habit title Due by %1$s Due time Set a title and a due time for the habit. Add habit Edit habit Edit habit Remove habit Schedule dock Assign apps to exact event names from your daily schedule Add schedule dock mapping Pick an event name and the apps it should surface No schedule dock mappings yet. Event name Apps Remove mapping Edit schedule dock mapping Search apps No apps selected Enable daily habits Overdue habits block distracting apps until completed Add habit Create a daily habit with a deadline Edit habit Habit name Due before %1$s No daily habits yet. Daily schedule Now Next Starts in %1$d min Ends in %1$d min No more schedule blocks today. Pick a calendar in Daily schedule settings to show your day here. Apps for this block Daily habits Distracting apps are locked until you complete: %1$s Distracting apps are locked until you complete your overdue habits. Done Due later Overdue Apply to personal profile Use focus restrictions for personal apps Apply to work profile Use focus restrictions for work apps Apply to private profile Use focus restrictions for private-space apps App type Blocking schedule Launch delay: %1$d seconds Default intentional session: %1$d minutes Daily budget: %1$d minutes Recurrence friction: %1$d min window, +%2$d s per repeat Block this app during active focus sessions Allow emergency bypass Enable hard block window Essential Normal Distracting Blocked now Always available Evenings (18:00-08:00) Weekends Evenings and weekends Pause before opening this app. If you still want it, choose a short session and continue intentionally. This app is currently blocked. If you still need it, unlock a short session intentionally. Open with intention This app is blocked right now This app has exhausted its daily budget. This app is blocked during your current productivity time. This lines up with your current block: %1$s. Your current block is %1$s. Only continue if this really belongs there. You\'re preparing for %1$s next. %1$s is already marked complete for today. %1$s starts in %2$d min. This app stays blocked until you finish your overdue habit. This app stays blocked until you finish: %1$s. This app is locked during the current focus session. A focus session is active. Only open this if it is worth interrupting your current block. This app is inside its blocked schedule right now. If you still need it, unlock a short session intentionally. Why are you opening this? Example: reply to one message, post a required update, check directions What do you need to move %1$s forward? First tiny step Example: open the doc, write the title, answer one message Intentional session length %1$d min Unlock duration: %1$d min Open intentionally Continue in %1$d… Pause for a second Pause for a second before deciding what comes next. %1$d seconds I\'m going back Use minimal focus home Show a calmer dashboard with essentials, next event, and focus-session controls Focus home Widgets are optional. The primary launcher experience should stay centered on the focus home. Resume Back to it Resume current block Dismiss Reset my focus Transition coming up Next up: %1$s Now %1$s ends in %2$d min Needs prep Next: %1$s in %2$d min Prep this block Ready to start %1$s is ready. Review next step Resume You paused %1$s. You paused %1$s during %2$s. Block: %1$s Next tiny step: %1$s Edit block plan Set up this block Review or continue %1$s is complete for today. Focus session No session running. Start one to make the launcher feel more intentional. %1$d minutes remaining in the current session Focus %1$d min Focus for %1$s End session Custom time Choose session length Intentional unlocks during this session: %1$d Last session: %1$d min, %2$d intentional unlocks Next alarm: %1$s Daily schedule Enable daily schedule and choose a calendar to see blocks. Choose a daily schedule calendar in settings to show today\'s blocks. Now Next Upcoming Ends in %1$d min Starts in %1$d min Block setup Edit block plan No schedule blocks configured for today. Between blocks right now. Keep essentials close and set up the next block when you need it. Assigned apps No apps are assigned to this block yet. Daily habits Enable daily habits to keep a short checklist here. No habits yet. Add a few in Daily habits settings. Due by %1$s Done Overdue Essentials Pin a few essentials to keep this surface small and predictable. Keep the basics close when no focus block is active. Web apps Sites you added to your home screen. Upcoming events No upcoming event right now. Commute actions Show one-tap actions for phone, SMS, camera, maps, and calendar on the focus home Focus At a Glance Show weather and next alarm on the focus home Choose Focus Apps Set up Daily Schedule Add Daily Habits Phone SMS Camera Maps Calendar Focus report Long-horizon review No long-horizon signals yet. %1$s Tap to apply. Recent intentional unlocks and this week’s focus breakers Intentional unlocks this week: %1$d Minutes unlocked this week: %1$d Average unlock delay: %1$d seconds Current streak without distracting launches: %1$d days Unlocks during focus sessions: %1$d Focus sessions Sessions this week: %1$d Focused minutes this week: %1$d Days with a finished session: %1$d What changed this week Unlocks vs previous week: %1$s Focused minutes vs previous week: %1$s %1$s vs previous week: %2$s No breaker delta yet. Schedule alignment Distracting unlocks during named blocks: %1$d Recovery cards accepted: %1$d Recovery cards dismissed: %1$d No interrupted blocks yet. Top focus breakers %1$s: %2$d unlocks Top unlock reasons %1$s: %2$d times No distracting app unlocks yet. No unlock reasons recorded yet. Long-horizon review No long-horizon signals yet. Apply Dismiss Recommendation dismissed Prep prompts enabled Could not match the suggested app Could not find the suggested habit Prep lead time increased to %1$s min Friction increased for %1$s Unlock cap shortened for %1$s Moved %1$s earlier Enable prep prompts Prep prompts can reduce rough starts before demanding blocks. Increase prep lead time A slightly earlier prep window may make transitions smoother. Move %1$s earlier Earlier habit deadlines can reduce late-night drift. %1$s setup Create a plan for this block Editing today\'s block plan This plan is saved for today\'s block and reused if you come back to it later. Changes will update the same-day plan for this block. Intention What does success look like for this block? First tiny step Start with one concrete, low-friction action Tiny step is optional when this block is marked complete. Optional note Recommended apps Recommended apps are already attached to this plan and will be preserved on save. No app suggestions are available for this block. Readiness checks Wait until habits are complete Treat this as a prep-led block Use assigned apps for this block Done for this block Mark this block as complete and skip the tiny-step prompt. This block will be treated as complete for today, and the launcher will stop prompting for a next tiny step. Save block plan Update block plan Mark block complete App grid & search results Calendar widget & search results Search results Never Home Mobile Work

in one minute
in %1$d minutes
departed Congratulations, you\'ve locked yourself out! You\'ve discovered a combination of settings that makes both the search and settings inaccessible — effectively locking you out of the launcher Export theme Import theme Name Author Font styles Add font style Remove this font style Device default Default headline font Device text font Generic Language and region Language, units, time format Language System default Disabled Form of address Neutral Feminine Masculine Measurement system Metric United Kingdom United States Preferred transliteration Automatic Calendar system Primary calendar Secondary calendar Select tag New tag Edit tag Quit without saving? Aa Ava Typ Hamburg Preview The quick brown fox\njumps over 1234790 Support the development Cancel Are you sure? Take a breath and reflect on your intention before opening this app. Continue to app ADHD Support & Automations "One-Sec" Interception Ask for confirmation before starting breathing exercise. Micro-Delays Enforce an unskippable 3-second delay to break impulsive loops. Daily Distraction Limit Time Blindness Reminders Vibrate and show a check-in while you keep using a distracting app, so long sessions don\'t slip by unnoticed. Reminder Interval Time Awareness A launcher can\'t close other apps, so these reminders are a nudge — not a hard block — while you overrun a distracting app. Usage access required to detect which app is open. Tap to grant. Allow notifications so reminders can reach you. Tap to grant. Time Management Notifications for focus session expiry Time to get back to work! Your session in %1$s has ended. Focus Insights Day Streak Focus Sessions Distractions Allowed Totalling %1$d minutes Top Distractions Plan for tomorrow Go back Choose a calendar Todoist tasks for tomorrow Timeline Tap to schedule a block Connect Todoist and load tomorrow\'s tasks first Loading tasks from Todoist… Todoist is not connected Add your personal API token in Focus settings to load tasks due tomorrow. Todoist rejected this token The saved token is invalid or has been revoked. Copy a current token from Todoist and save it again. Could not reach Todoist Check your internet connection, then try again. Todoist returned an error The service could not load tasks right now. Try again in a moment. No tasks due tomorrow Todoist is connected, but there are no active tasks with tomorrow\'s due date. Open Todoist settings Try again Schedule at %1$02d:00 Duration in minutes Choose a task Planning Plan your day Plan Your Day Time Check You have been here continuously for %1$d minutes. Is this in line with your intention? Understood What is your main intention for today? e.g. Finish the project, go for a workout... DAILY INTENTION Brain dump Jot down an idea and save... Save note Share note Recent notes Delete note Clear all Remember your intention for today: %1$s Setup Day planning Guidance and review Basics Visibility and home Browsing, visual weight, and focus home signals Adaptive friction, launch pauses, and daily limits Time blindness reminders and check-in cadence Profiles and context Device profiles, adaptive context, and review suggestions External focus helpers and connected services Todoist integration Link Todoist to view tasks from your focus surfaces API token saved. The day planner will verify it when loading tasks. Personal access token In Todoist on the web, open Settings → Integrations → Developer, copy the API token, then paste it below. Clear the field to disconnect Todoist. How to find your Todoist token Open Todoist\'s illustrated instructions in your browser %1$d launches %1$d min General Visuals & Hiding Friction & Delays Rules & Apps Time Management Integrations
